name: Crispy Peanut Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup salted peanuts or mixed nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring butter, sugar, and white syrup to a rolling boil.
2. Remove from heat and stir in 1 cup peanut butter and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
3. Add 1 cup salted peanuts or mixed nuts and 8 cups Corn Flakes. Stir until well coated.
4. Spread mixture into a 5 x 10 inch pan.
5. Best when refrigerated.
